goal: Launch a minimal protected admin view that lets one operator process all pending moderation work without opening the database or code.

surfaces: admin dashboard home with queue summary cards
queue item detail panel with approve/reject/hide actions

defaultWorkflow: Dashboard shows count cards: pending profiles, pending/flagged reviews, open message reports
Admin opens queue sorted by oldest submittedAt first
Admin applies one action from item detail
Item leaves active queue and action is stored in audit log
operationalConstraints: All /admin routes require authenticated admin session
Every moderation action writes actorId, action, targetId, timestamp
State changes must map to existing feature states (no new public statuses)
Action latency target: <1 second server response for single item action
If an action fails, item remains unchanged and error is shown
acceptanceCriteria: Unauthenticated users cannot access any /admin route
Admin dashboard home displays accurate queue counts for profiles, reviews, and message reports
Unified queue lists at least id, type, submittedAt, status, and riskLevel for each active item
Admin can complete one moderation action for each queue type end-to-end
Successful action removes item from active queue and persists audit metadata
No analytics, bulk actions, or user management UI is required for launch
shipDefinition: MVP is shippable when one admin can clear daily moderation backlog from this dashboard in under 30 minutes without manual DB edits.
